job_summary: 6sense is a company dedicated to fostering growth, retention, and efficiency through their innovative technology. They are seeking an Infrastructure Software Engineer to own platform engineering responsibilities, ensuring the scalability, reliability, and security of their internal developer platform while supporting engineering teams.
